name: PER_JOB_EVALUATIONS_
description: PER_JOB_EVALUATIONS holds the schemes and systems that the Enterprise uses to evaluate the jobs and positions stored in PER_JOBS_F and HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F. For each one, either the JOB_ID column or the POSITION_ID column will be populated, but not both.

columns.Name: JOB_EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_JOBS_F table.

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ALL_POSITIONS_F table.

columns.Name: EVALUATION_SYSTEM
columns.Comments: Evaluation system used for jobs or positions, for example Hay System.

columns.Name: DATE_EVALUATED
columns.Comments: Date of the evaluation.

columns.Name: MEASURED_IN
columns.Comments: Measurement unit for the evaluation, for example points.

columns.Name: OVERALL_SCORE
columns.Comments: Total number of points for the seeded hay evaluation system.

columns.Name: ACCOUNTABILITY
columns.Comments: Accountability is a seeded criterion for the hay evaluation system.

columns.Name: KNOWHOW
columns.Comments: Knowhow is a seeded criterion for the hay evaluation system.

columns.Name: PROBLEM_SOLVING
columns.Comments: Problem Solving is a seeded criterion for the hay evaluation system.

columns.Name: WORKING_CONDITIONS
columns.Comments: Working Conditions is a seeded criterion for the hay evaluation system.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the impersonator who last updated the row.
